name: Far East Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces tofu or tempeh, steamed for minutes and cooled
Simmer for 45 minutes until liquid is absorbed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or skillet.
2. Brown the tofu or tempeh according to package instructions (or until firm).
3. Stir in the cooked rice.
4. Saute for a few minutes until heated through.
5. Add the cooked vegetables and stir fry until crisp-tender, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Mix all ingredients well.
7. Sprinkle with green onions on top.
